text: Read, ˹O Prophet,˺ in the Name of your Lord Who created—
created humans from a clinging clot. <sup foot_note=1319>1319</sup>

foot_notes.1319: ’ Alaq , meaning the embryo resembles a leech.

text: Read! And your Lord is the Most Generous,
taught humanity what they knew not.
Most certainly, one exceeds all bounds
once they think they are self-sufficient.
˹But˺ surely to your Lord is the return ˹of all˺.
Have you seen the man who prevents
a servant ˹of Ours˺ from praying? <sup foot_note=1320>1320</sup>

foot_notes.1320: Abu Jahl was a staunch leader of the Meccan opposition to Islam. There are many authentic stories of his abuse of the Prophet ( ﷺ ) .

text: What if that ˹man˺ persists in denial and turns away?
Does he not know that Allah sees ˹all˺?
But no! If he does not desist, We will certainly drag him by the forelock—

foot_notes.1321: This refers to the frontal lobe of the brain, where reasoning is processed.

text: So let him call his associates.
We will call the wardens of Hell.
Again, no! Never obey him ˹O Prophet˺! Rather, ˹continue to˺ prostrate and draw near ˹to Allah˺.
